shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "pwd && rg --files -g '"'!*node_modules*'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' | head -80 && printf '\\n--- package ---\\n' && (sed -n '1,220p' package.json 2>/dev/null || true) && printf '\\n--- next/config/middleware candidates ---\\n' && rg -n \"middleware|NextRequest|NextResponse|instrumentation|app/|pages/|request\" -g '"'!node_modules'"' -g '"'!*.lock'"' . | head -160"

/bin/bash -lc "git status --short && printf '\\n--- tsconfig ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' tsconfig.json && printf '\\n--- dirs ---\\n' && find . -maxdepth 2 -type f -not -path './.git/*' -not -path './node_modules/*' -print"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,220p' app/page.tsx && printf '\\n--- layout ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' app/layout.tsx && printf '\\n--- next config ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' next.config.ts"

errors: `--dangerously-bypass-hook-trust` is enabled. Enabled hooks may run without review for this invocation.
